Ntc And Mtn For An Order Compelling Deft Rpod Pursuant To A Deposition Ntc And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Thien Yew Ng's motion to compel defendant Cecilia Chan-Ng to produce documents pursuant to a deposition notice is moot as documents were provided after the filing of the motion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $865 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant's motion for an order establishing admissions is denied as responses have been served.
